name: Chocolate Biscotti
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt chocolate and butter in a heavy saucepan over low heat.
2. Beat eggs at medium speed with an electric mixer until frothy.
3. Gradually add sugar, beating until thick and pale (about 5 minutes).
4. Add chocolate mixture, stirring until blended.
5. Combine flour and baking powder; stir into chocolate mixture.
6. Stir in nuts.
7. Form dough into a 13-inch log and place on a lightly greased baking sheet.
8. Brush with egg white.
9. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes; cool on a wire rack.
10. Cut the log crosswise into 24 slices (1/2-inch thick) and place on an ungreased cookie sheet.
11. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes on each side.
12. Remove to wire racks to cool.
